runId.description: Narrative pipeline run ID (from narrative:list-runs or narrative:start-pipeline). For milestone-incremental import, the run only needs to have reached the corresponding milestone step.

title.description: Optional display title for the imported scenario. Defaults to the narrative run's title or a generated slug. Imports of the same runId merge into one scenario.

setActive.description: Mark the imported scenario as the active (playable) interactive film. Defaults to false: staged outline/character drafts are NOT playable and activating them would hijack the Play workspace of every game. Only pass true once the scenario is genuinely playable (e.g. after the screenplay milestone).

milestone.description: Milestone-incremental import (staged collaboration): 'outline_acts' (M2) imports the three-act outline, character bios and key items into the top-level scenario fields the studio panels read (scenario.outline / scenario.characters / scenario.characterRelations, with a relation graph derived from bios.role + key_items.bound_character) plus raw payloads under scenario.meta; 'branched_beats' (M3) imports the branch tree as scene skeletons; 'screenplay' (M4) imports full scenes (dialogue/QTE/media). Omit to auto-detect the furthest available milestone (legacy one-shot end import). runId may be the logical run id or the run's directory key; both resolve correctly.
